mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in FEDFUNDS raises equity discount rates and tightens financing conditions, causing lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when policy rates are rising.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 3.78 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered rising-FEDFUNDS observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.7 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward S&P 500 returns after the UNRATE trigger are not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point or have t-test p > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises sharply while CPIAUCSL inflation momentum slows, policy becomes more restrictive in real terms, compressing valuations and generating negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 1.0 percentage point over 6 months while CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation momentum declines
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 298.349 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger has a nonnegative average 20-day excess return versus baseline or if interaction terms add no predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Stronger 3-month growth in RSAFS signals resilient consumer demand and near-term revenue support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 689443.0 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher RSAFS 3-month growth is associated with lower subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in INDPRO signals falling goods output and weaker operating leverage, lowering earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was 104.5175 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean in at least 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST during high FEDFUNDS conditions transmits rate tightening into housing and durables demand, reducing cyclical earnings and producing negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: HOUST year-over-year growth crosses below -15% while FEDFUNDS is above 3.0%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1425.0 for 2022-10 as visible by 2022-12-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST and FEDFUNDS trigger does not produce lower 60-day returns than either single proxy alone in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential deceleration in CPIAUCSL during an already elevated FEDFUNDS regime signals easing inflation pressure and a lower expected terminal rate, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL monthly inflation change declines for 3 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS is above 3.0%
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 3.78 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
regime_hint: inflation-relief phase of a tightening cycle
failure_condition: Reject if this trigger has a hit rate below the unconditional positive-return rate for 20-day S&P 500 returns or a negative average forward return.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth stays strong while UNRATE is below 4%, labor tightness increases expected wage pressure and hawkish policy risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4.0% and PAYEMS 3-month growth exceeds 0.3%
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 153548.0 for 2022-11 as visible by 2022-12-15
regime_hint: tight labor market during inflation-fighting policy
failure_condition: Reject if the joint tight-labor trigger produces positive 5-day S&P 500 returns at least 65% of the time or if its mean return is not below baseline.
